name: Silver Mane Baek Yoonho
title: Guild Master of the White Tiger Guild

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Magic Beast's Claws
basic.description: Yoonho tears the enemies apart with sharp steel claws.

core.name: Slaughter
core.description: Yoonho tears the enemy apart using the steel claws on his hands.

skill.name: Violent Approach
skill.description: Yoonho cuts enemies into pieces by quickly swinging the steel claws on his hands.

skill.name: Extreme Attack: Beast Form
skill.description: Yoonho strengthens himself with a White Tiger roar. Activates [Extreme Attack: Beast Form] (Super Armor; Attack +100%; Attack Speed +30%; damage taken +15% for 12 seconds).

support.name: Magic Beast's Instinct
support.description: Yoonho awakens his magic beast instincts and roars. Applies [Quick Attack: Beast Form] (Attack +30%, damage taken +10%, 15 seconds).

qte.name: Magic Beast's Ambush
qte.description: Yoonho lunges at the enemy in midair and tears them apart.

ultimate.name: Divinity
ultimate.description: Yoonho scrapes the ground and makes a powerful upward slash, tearing the enemy apart. Silver Mane Baek Yoonho's damage increases by 30% for every 10% of his HP lost.

passive.name: Magic Beast's Rage
passive.description: The user's skills deal additional damage equal to 100% of their HP lost. When Slaughter or Violent Approach hits, inflicts [Bleed] on the target (damage equal to 1% of current HP every 3 seconds for 30 seconds). Inflicts [Curse of the Magic Beast] to targets immune to [Bleed] (damage equal to 1000% of Silver Mane Baek Yoonho's Max HP every 3 seconds for 30 seconds). Increases the damage of Magic Beast's Claws and Slaughter by 60% when dealing damage to targets with [Bleed or Curse of the Magic Beast] applied.

advancements: Using Extreme Attack: Beast Form increases the user's Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage by 3% every second for 12 seconds. While using Extreme Attack: Beast Form, the user takes damage equal to 10% of their current HP, but gains a [Shield] equal to 30% of Max HP for 12 seconds. The user's damage taken decreases by 15% when HP is at 30% or fewer.
The user starts the battle with HP reduced by 50%. When the battle starts the user gains a [Shield] equal to 60% of their Max HP (infinite duration).
The user's Basic Attack and Core Attack damage increases by 100%.
Changes the user's Skill Damage Increase equal to 200% of lost HP ratio.
